expectations.text: hook_theme() returns array with 'variables' key listing all template variables
expectations.evidence: hook_theme() returns variables with items and heading defaults

expectations.text: Template filename uses hyphens (e.g., featured-resources-list.html.twig), NOT underscores
Render array uses #theme key referencing the hook_theme entry
featured_resources.libraries.yml defines the library with CSS path
Does NOT build raw HTML strings (no Markup::create with HTML tags in build methods)
expectations.evidence: No raw HTML construction; all via #theme and Twig

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en featured_resources returns exit code 0
E2E: Template renders without PHP errors
expectations.evidence: Theme hook registered in theme registry; module enabled without errors
